allow: Bash(python3 -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open\(''D:/Downloads/finestics icon.png''\); print\(img.size, img.mode\)")

Bash(node -e "const sharp = require\(''sharp''\); console.log\(''sharp ok'', sharp.versions.sharp\)")
